10.reason: Loop should go to i < len-1 to avoid out-of-bounds access of str[i+1] when i is the last index; also the last character should be printed separately as in reference.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop should go to i < len-1 to avoid out-of-bounds access of str[i+1] when i is the last index; also the last character should be printed separately as in reference.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  // Loop bound should be i<len-1 to avoid accessing str[i+1] out of bounds; also last character needs separate handling
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Loop condition should be i < len - 1 to prevent out-of-bounds access to str[i+1] when i points to the last character.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Loop condition allows i to reach len-1, causing str[i+1] to access out-of-bounds memory. Should be i < len - 1.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Range check should be <= 25 because 'z' - 'a' is 25; <= 26 incorrectly includes '{'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Range check <=26 is off-by-one; 'z'-'a' is 25, so <=25 should be used to strictly match [a-z].
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Condition (str[i-1]-'a')<=26 allows 'z'+1 (i.e., '{'), which is beyond 'z'; should be <=25. Also, this check doesn't ensure str[i+1] is within bounds]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Condition (str[i-1]-'a')<=26 is incorrect; 'z'-'a'=25, so should be <=25. Also, this allows non-lowercase chars like '{' to pass]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Same logical error: 'Z'-'A'=25, so <=26 is too permissive]
